address.linked_to_student_by: Birth Certificate lists same address for student and parents; Electricity Bill addressed to SAM COURT at same address

provenance.student_identity: Birth Certificate (preferred source), supported by Passport and Immunisation History Statement
provenance.residential_address: Electricity Bill supported by Birth Certificate

conflicts_or_uncertainties: Several documents including Immunisation History Statement, COVID-19 digital certificate, and Tax Invoice use the surname 'Court' for the student instead of 'Crowe'. Birth Certificate is treated as authoritative for legal name.
School Report appears unrelated and names 'Natalie Carter' rather than the student.
notes: Birth Certificate used as primary source for student identity, date of birth, country of birth, and parent relationships in accordance with source priority rules. Passport confirms student identity details but contains no parent or address information. Residential address consistently appears as 26 Norton Street, Surry Hills NSW 2010 across Birth Certificate, Electricity Bill, and Tax Invoice.
